artifacts.MANIFEST.json: pack identity, source git truth, counts, rules
artifacts.TREE_INDEX.jsonl: one row per repo file with organ/kind/zone/hash metadata
artifacts.TOOL_PASSPORT_INDEX.json: tool passport paths and extracted tool ids
artifacts.SOURCE_SLICE_MANIFEST.json: selected source slices copied into PATCH_TARGET_SLICES
artifacts.ATLAS_INDEX.sqlite: SQL-ready local index for files, edges, passports, manifest
